description: You are evaluating whether a frozen futures setup has enough edge to trade. Review /home/ga/Desktop/MarketTasks/trade_or_abstain/scenario.json and save a forecast to /home/ga/Documents/MarketForecasts/trade_or_abstain_forecast.json. The file must include a probability for the target 'target_hit_before_stop' and a decision field set to one of ['long', 'short', 'abstain'].
